mapper.select: SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO ,(SELECT DEPT_CD FROM STOCCVUR WHERE GATE_CD = TCCT.GATE_CD AND USER_ID = TCCT.CONT_USER_ID) AS BRC , ((TCCT.EMP_SIGN_DATE, SYSDATE), 'yyyyMMdd') AS APLY_DT , TCCT.CONT_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'TCCT' '@@' TCCT.GATE_CD '@@' TCCT.BUYER_CD '@@' TCCT.CONT_NUM '@@' TCCT.CONT_CNT '@@' TCCT.USER_ID AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCTCCT TCCT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CUST.GATE_CD = TCCT.GATE_CD AND CUST.CUST_CD = TCCT.BUYER_CD) WHERE TCCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TCCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND TCCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND TCCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND TCCT.USER_ID = #{ses.userId} AND TCCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT USER_ID , USER_NM AS USER_NM , GENDER , SUBSTR(REPLACE(CELL_NUM,'-',''), 1, 3) AS CELL_NUM1 , SUBSTR(REPLACE(CELL_NUM,'-',''), 4, 4) AS CELL_NUM2 , SUBSTR(REPLACE(CELL_NUM,'-',''), 8, 4) AS CELL_NUM3 , EMAIL AS EMAIL , ZIP_CD AS ZIP_CD , ADDR_1 AS ADDR , ADDR_2 AS ADDR_ETC , SUBSTR((TO_DATE(BIRTH_DATE), 'YYYYMMDD'), 1, 4) AS BIRTH_DATE1 , SUBSTR((TO_DATE(BIRTH_DATE), 'YYYYMMDD'), 5, 2) AS BIRTH_DATE2 , SUBSTR((TO_DATE(BIRTH_DATE), 'YYYYMMDD'), 7, 2) AS BIRTH_DATE3 , SITE_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(GATE_CD, SITE_USER_ID, (#{LANG_CD}, #{ses.langCd})) AS SITE_USER_NM , PROGRESS_CD FROM STOCTVUR WHERE UPPER(USER_ID) = UPPER((#{USER_ID}, #{ses.userId})) AND GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd}

SELECT MAX(EMAIL_CNT) AS EMAIL_CNT , MAX(USR_EMAIL_CNT) AS USR_EMAIL_CNT FROM ( SELECT COUNT(USR.EMAIL) AS EMAIL_CNT , 0 AS USR_EMAIL_CNT FROM STOCTVUR USR WHERE USR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UPPER(USR.EMAIL) = UPPER(#{EMAIL}) AND USR.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USR.USER_TYPE = 'T'
UNION ALL
SELECT 0 AS EMAIL_CNT , COUNT(USR.EMAIL) AS USR_EMAIL_CNT FROM STOCTVUR USR WHERE USR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UPPER(USER_ID) = UPPER(#{USER_ID}) AND UPPER(USR.EMAIL) = UPPER(#{EMAIL}) AND USR.USER_TYPE = 'T' AND USR.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A

SELECT USR.USER_ID , USR.USER_NM AS USER_NM , USR.DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(USR.GATE_CD, USR.COMPANY_CD, USR.DEPT_CD, 'KO') AS DEPT_NM , (USR.DUTY_NM, ' ') as DUTY_NM , GETCUSTNAME(USR.GATE_CD, USR.COMPANY_CD) AS COMPANY_NM FROM STOCCVUR USR WHERE USR.USE_FLAG = '1'
AND UPPER(USR.USER_NM) LIKE UPPER('%' #{USER_NM} '%')
AND UPPER(GETDEPTNAME(USR.GATE_CD, USR.COMPANY_CD, USR.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE UPPER('%' #{DEPT_NM} '%')
AND USR.PROGRESS_CD = 'E' AND USR.USER_TYPE = 'B' AND USR.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd}
AND USR.COMPANY_CD = 'C08761' ORDER BY USR.USER_NM

SELECT USER_ID , USER_NM AS USER_NM , CELL_NUM AS CELL_NUM FROM STOCTVUR WHERE 1 = 1
AND UPPER(USER_NM) = UPPER((#{USER_NM}))
AND UPPER(USER_ID) = UPPER(#{USER_ID})
AND REPLACE(CELL_NUM,'-','')= #{CELL_NUM} AND PROGRESS_CD = 'E' AND USE_FLAG = '1' AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USER_TYPE = 'T' AND GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd}

SELECT GETCODENAME(TCCT.GATE_CD, 'NH0064', TCCT.PROGRESS_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS CODE_DESC , TCCT.CONT_DESC , ((TCCT.EMP_SIGN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), '') AS SIGN_DATE , TCCT.ATT_FILE_NUM AS UUID , ATCH.UUID_SQ , TCCT.USER_ID AS USER_ID , (TCCT.CONT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CONT_DATE , (TCCT.CONT_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CONT_START_DATE , (TCCT.CONT_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CONT_END_DATE , GETUSERNAME(TCCT.GATE_CD, TCCT.USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS USER_NM , TCCT.CONT_TYPE , TO_CHAR(TCCT.WORKER_PAY_AMT, 'FM999,999,999,999,999,999') AS WORKER_PAY_AMT , (TCCT.BIRTH_DATE, 'YYYY"년"MM"월"DD"일"') AS BIRTH_DATE , TCCT.PHONE_NUM AS PHONE_NUM , TCCT.CONT_NUM , TCCT.CONT_CNT , ATCH.FILE_PATH , (TCCT.SIGN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS SIGN_DATE2 , TCCT.BUYER_CD FROM STOCTCCT TCCT LEFT JOIN STOCATCH ATCH ON(TCCT.GATE_CD = ATCH.GATE_CD AND TCCT.ATT_FILE_NUM = ATCH.UUID AND ATCH.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE TCCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UPPER(TCCT.USER_ID) = UPPER(#{ses.userId}) AND TCCT.PROGRESS_CD IN ('4210','4300') AND TCCT.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY TCCT.PROGRESS_CD, TCCT.CONT_DATE DESC

SELECT ECCF.FORM_FILE_NM , TCRL.FORM_SQ FROM STOCTCRL TCRL JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON TCRL.GATE_CD = ECCF.GATE_CD AND TCRL.BUYER_CD = ECCF.BUYER_CD WHERE TCRL.CONT_NUM= #{CONT_NUM} AND TCRL.FORM_NUM = ECCF.FORM_NUM ORDER BY TCRL.FORM_SQ

SELECT NOTC.SUBJECT , (NOTC.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE , CODD.CODE_DESC , NOTC.NOTICE_NUM FROM STOCNOTC NOTC JOIN STOCCODD CODD ON(NOTC.GATE_CD = CODD.GATE_CD AND NOTC.NOTICE_TYPE = CODD.CODE AND CODD.CODE_TYPE = 'M011' AND CODD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE NOTC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND NOTC.VIEW_TYPE IN ('USNA', 'USNP') AND NOTC.NOTICE_TYPE NOT IN ('PCP') AND NOTC.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND (NOTC.START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') <= (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND (NOTC.END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') >= (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY NOTC.FIXED_TOP_FLAG, NOTC.START_DATE DESC

SELECT NOTICE_NUM , NOTICE_NUM AS NOTICE_NUM_ORI , SUBJECT , NOTICE_TYPE , (START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_DATE , (END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_DATE , VIEW_CNT , ATT_FILE_NUM , NOTICE_TEXT_NUM , GATE_CD , REG_USER_ID , FIXED_TOP_FLAG FROM STOCNOTC WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND NOTICE_NUM = #{noticeNo} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
